title: folder0_partial.raw

format_assessment.observed_structure: Concatenated source/code/report dump containing Python, TypeScript/TSX, Docker, YAML, SQL, Markdown and generated status prose.

quarantine.reason: Unverified generated assertions conflict with current live and repository evidence.
Conflicts with owner authority, safety, budget, privacy and release controls.

quarantine.pattern: simulated findings|placeholder web results|mock connections|mock execution
quarantine.reason: Scaffold or demonstration behavior cannot be represented as integrated runtime.

quarantine.pattern: medical, legal, tax or investment recommendations presented from static code
quarantine.reason: High-risk outputs require current authoritative sources, qualified escalation and domain-specific safety controls.
A health check must fail closed when the service endpoint is unavailable.

conflicts.decision: Preserve both; neither is accepted as runtime truth.

conflicts.decision: Module denominator is unknown until clean manifest and repository snapshot are supplied.

conflicts.source_claim: No security vulnerabilities or unhandled errors

next_actions: Promote accepted capability candidates only through requirement, implementation, test and evidence mappings.
Obtain raw bytes or a clean archive to compute hashes and reconstruct original file boundaries.
Do not import source completion certificates as evidence.
completion_assertion: Bounded extraction and triage are complete for the retrieved regions; whole-file ingestion and denominator completeness are not proven.
